text: Hey Zwilka. So I'm making this video to describe what I changed in the forecast. And it was done on 16th of October. So it has been more than two weeks already. Now what I changed is for some items, I changed them from January and wherever I have done it, I have added a comment that it was updated on October 16th. So if you check from the beginning, I did it for cookies and cream bars and then all these products. Basically wherever I have added comments and I have done it based on the adjusted number for November and December, which are not here by the way. They were, if you remember, we had a meeting, we had a team meeting where we were going over the monthly sales and then we adjusted the forecast for November and December. So I basically followed the same trend and adjusted the numbers here. So yeah, that's all about the no Sugar company products. But it has been more than two weeks already and I think we should be doing this every month. So I guess we should do another one this month. And another thing is about the Slim Quick products. So here I have added the Slim Quick products, the forecast for SlimQuick products. And apart from these mixberry flavor one, we are not selling any of these. Right. So what I have done in that case is I detected like when they were selling consistently and I have done this forecast based on those times and that's basically it. Let me know if there is something else. Thank you.
